rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 6/10 and rest on the same job-relevant reasoning: a diverse background but a lack of direct Java, Kotlin, and Spring/enterprise experience. The wording differs slightly (e.g. 'community engagement' vs 'contributions to developer tooling', and the added note about not being directly relevant to the IDE/JVM domain), but these are reworded restatements of the same concerns and fall within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant references location, nationality, or anything tied to the Berlin-to-Brazil change.
